title: Shared Types
description: Types that are shared between different models

Comment.description: Object to define comments in the diagrams

label.description: optional number or a short text, displayed in the marker of that comment

format.description: format to use to render this comment

step.description: optional step where this comment is part of, is filled via processing not by the user

ConnRestriction.description: container to define closer how a connection should be routed

source.description: restricts the start of the connection

dest.description: restricts the end of the connection

ConnRestrItem.description: possible options to restrict a connection start or end

noTop.description: no connection start or end to the top border of a box

noBottom.description: no connection start or end to the bottom border of a box

noLeft.description: no connection start or end to the left border of a box

noRight.description: no connection start or end to the right border of a box
